upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yahvAsiva pra vayAmujjihAnAH' (vA॰saM॰15.24)
mahAntaH pakziRo yaTA vfkzaSAKAM parityajyorDvaNgacCeyurityAha atra praSabdo viprakarzaM viSlezaM parityAgamAha yaTA pravrajyetyatra ucCandaSca UrDvaBAvam
'saM sahase purumAyo jihIte' (f0 3514) saMjihIte=gamanodyamaM karoti
'yadA vE tAntaH prARaM laBate'Ta saMjihIte' (kO0 u0) saMjihIte=uttizWati
'sEtena prARena samajihIta' (Sa0 brA0 42211) samajihIta=udasTAt=samajIvIt
'tata: punarnasahAsyante' (Sa0 brA0 12411) notTAsyanti na Sira unnamayizyantItyAha
'yaTA jale saYjihate jalOkasaH' (BA0 pu0 104015) saMjihate pracarantIti SrIDaraH yaTAnyatra taTehApi kave rUQiM pratyanAdaraH
'sa ha prAtaH saMjihAna uvAca' (CAM0 u0 5115) saMjihAnaH SayyAM parityajan

sampUrvo jahAtiH SayyAparityAge vartate taTA ca brAhmaRe prayogaH - 'kaliH SayAno Bavati saMjihAnastu dvAparaH' (E0 brA0 715) iti sAyaRaH atra sAyaRIye vacane jahAtirityanena ohANo grahaRaM veditavyaM na tvohAkaH
'sa visrastEH parvaBiH na SaSAka saMhAtum' (Sa0 brA0 1336) saMhAtum=utTAtum
'utsaMhAyAsTAt' (f0 2384) sarvo lokaH SayyAM vihAya udasTAd avaSizwaM karma kartuM punaruttizWatIti sAyaRaH
'saMhAya ato devA avantu naH' (f0 2216) iti triretam ASva0 gf0 229) sahAya=SayitvotTAya
'asminnAkASe Syeno vA suparRo vA viparipatya SrAntaH saMhAya pakzO saMlayAyEva Driyate' (bf0 u0 4319) saMhAya saSlezya saMkocya
'vidyuto jyotiH parisaMjihAnaM mitrAvaruRA yadapaSyatAM tvA' (f0 73310) saYjihAnamutTitam

'saMhAya sOryARi svastyayanAni ca japitvA' (ASva0 gf0 2312) saMhAya saMSasyeti nArAyaRo vfttikAraH sampUrva ohAN SayyAta utTAne rUQa iti prasmaraRapratyayametat pUrvasUtre saMhAya ato devA bruvantu na ityatra saMhAyetyutTAyetyevaM svenEvArTABiDAnAt
'stamBasya maDyAdanunirjihAnam' (BA0 pu0 7819) krameRa nizkrAmantam ityarTaH
'vijihIzva lokam' (aTarva0 61214) viviDaM gacCetyarTaH
'varAheRa pfTivI saMvidAnA sUkarAya vi jihIte mfgAya' (aTarva0 12148) vijihIte vivaraM dadAtItyarTaH
'sa vAyumAgacCati tasmE sa tatra vijihIte' (Sa0 brA0 148121) vijihIte'pasarpati avakASaM dadAti
'vi parvARi jihatAM sUtavA u' (aTarva0 1111) prasavaniroDakAH sanDibanDA vijihatAM vigacCantu viSlaTA Bavantviti sAyaRaH
'vijihIzva vanaspate yoniH sUzyantyA iva' (f0 5785) vijihIzva=vigacCa vivftA Bava vanaspatirvanaspativikAraH pewikA
'aTAsyA UrU vihApayati' (Sa0 brA0 149420) vihApayati pfTakkaroti viyOti viyunAti
'vi yoniM hApayAmasi' (aTarva0 1113) vihApayAmasi vihApayAmo vivfRmaH
'sukIrtinA kAkzIvatena yoniM vyahApayat' (E0 brA0 515) vyahApayad garBaniHsaraRAyAvakASamakarodityAha
'idaM tacCIrzakapAlaM vihApya yadidamantarataH SIrzRo vIryaM tadasmindaDAti' (Sa0 brA0 75225) vihApya vidArya
'(agnAvizRU yuvAm) mA…vi jihATAm' (tE0 saM0 1112) mama mArgapradAnArTaM vigacCatam
'sa vAyumAgacCati tasmE sa tatra vijihIte yaTA raTacakrasya Kam' (bfha0 u0 5101) vijihIte svAtmAnaM viSlizwAvayavaM karoti
'aTa SIrzRA yUpamatyujjihIte' (Sa0 brA0 52114) atyujjihIte Askandati Arohati
'parAtaraM su nirftirjihItAm' (f0 10591) sujihItAM sutarAM gacCatu apEtu
'tAsAmAsTAnAdujjihatAmozaDayaH supippalAH' (vA0 saM0 1138) ujjihatAm udgacCantu
'apAM vA AsTAnAdujjihata ozaDayaH supippalAH' (Sa0 brA0  6432) ukto'rTaH
'AvirBUtAnurAgAH kzaRamudayagirerujjihAnasya BAnoH' (mudrA0 422) ujjihAnasya udayamAnasya AkramamARasya
'SirasA yUpamujjihIte' (kA0 SrO0 14510)
'sOmitrirakziBruvamujjihAnaH' (Bawwi0 347) atrApyohAN sakarmakaH UrDvaM nayane utkzipannityarTaH
'udAtErjihate bfhad dvAro devI rhiraRyayIH' (f0 955) ujjihata udgacCanti
'kaTamiva bata lajjA tasya nEvojjihIte' (rukmiRI0 123) ujjihIte udayate
'paritApaharAM harastadAnIM dyunadIM tAmaDunApi nojjihIte' (skandapu0 kA0 4446) ujjihIte jahAti tyajati atra ohANaH prayoge kimapi svAtantryaM purARakArasya
'tasyAByagnirEtaSAyana etyAkAle'BihAya muKamapyagfhRAt' (E0 brA0 633) aBihAya svAsanAdutTAya
'prARamaByujjihate' (CAM0 u0 1115) prARata (eva) utpadyanta ityarTaH
'asfgramindra te giraH prati tvAmudahAsata' (f0 194) pratyudahAsata udgatya prApan
'upAjihITA na mahItalaM yadi' (SiSu0 137) nopAjihITA nAgacCeH nAvatareH
